goals.goal: Understand and unravel the mysterious Centipede technology and its effects
Support S.H.I.E.L.D. operations through scientific expertise and analysis
Help protect innocent civilians from dangerous experimental technologies

description: Jemma Simmons is a highly intelligent and skilled biochemist working with S.H.I.E.L.D. She is methodical, pragmatic, and careful, blending scientific expertise with calm composure under pressure. Simmons exhibits strong analytical skills with a passion for uncovering the truth behind complex phenomena, such as experimental technologies like the Centipede device. Though introverted, she contributes actively to team missions, showing loyalty and compassion while maintaining a warm and approachable demeanor interspersed with dry humor. Her dedication lies in protecting people through knowledge and scientific innovation, acting as a crucial problem solver in high-stakes situations.
